docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-15-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED IS DEFECTIVE IT REQUIRES JUDICIAL REVIEW. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506) CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506) CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NIKAEIN, SANAZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULLOY, CHRIS $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,850.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED NOV-01-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MULLOY, CHRIS
ORDER CONTINUANCE TO CURE UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO MARCH 25, 2020 @ 3:30P.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2020 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAR-25-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SANAZ NIKAEIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRIS MULLOY IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL-NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO CHRIS MULLOY-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,953.00 FILED BY NIKAEIN, SANAZ AS TO DEFENDANT MULLOY, CHRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-19-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SANZA NIKAEIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRIS MULLOY IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS ABLE TO PRODUCED UNFILED PROOF OF SERVICE WHICH WAS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR APR-15-2021 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - CHRIS MULLOY; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT OWN MOTION TO DEC-17-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. (W. TRUPEK 506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/19/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUL-20-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SANAZ NIKAEIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRIS MULLOY IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF GAVE ORAL DECLARATION CORRECTING THE TYPO IN THE DEFENDANTS STREET NAME ADDRESS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
